scripts.check:no-placeholder: if [ ! -d dist ]; then echo 'ERROR: dist/ not found — run build first'; exit 1; fi; if grep -rq REPLACE_ME dist; then echo 'ERROR: REPLACE_ME placeholder present in build output — set the real S3 URL in src/config.ts before deploying'; exit 1; else echo 'OK: no REPLACE_ME in dist'; fi
